package rulefixtures

import (
	"fmt"
	"log"
)

// scenario for logger_created_per_request: `zap.NewProduction()` or `logrus.New()` inside handler functions
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: warning.
func scenario417Positive(values []string) {
	for _, value := range values {
		log.Print(fmt.Sprintf("value=%s", value))
	}
}
